subcodes.first_line: O servant of the divine Threshold! Thy letter dated the fourth of August 1913 was received. Abundant praise for the teaching [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی نامه بتاریخ چهارم آگست ۱۹۱۳ رسید ستایش بسیار از تدریس
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @non-participation in politics, @unity in diversity
